migrationPanel.title: Migrate to new GC Platform sign in
migrationPanel.bodyLead: Use the same email address as your GC Forms account. Keep existing forms and responses.
migrationPanel.bodyDeadline: Create a GC Platform account by October 30, 2026 to keep using GC Forms.

username.label: Email address
username.description: Enter your own individual government email address.
